name: python3-plumbum
title: python3-plumbum
summary: library for writing shell script-like programs in Python 3
description:
library for writing shell script-like programs in Python 3
python-plumbum provides shell-like syntax and handy shortcuts for writing shell
script one-liners in Python using shell combinators. It supports local and
remote command execution (over SSH), local and remote file-system paths,
easy working-directory and environment manipulation and a programmatic
Command-Line Interface (CLI) application toolkit.
.
This is the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-plumbum because library for writing shell script-like programs in Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-plumbum as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-plumbum with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-plumbum --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
